# Explanation: .github/instructions/copilot-context-efficiency.instructions.md

## Current Role
This scoped instruction file enforces context-budget discipline for Copilot workflow and planning documents.

## What It Adds
- Keeps always-on files concise by pushing heavy detail into scoped docs.
- Requires section-targeted reads for large files.
- Reinforces deterministic command boundary workflow.
- Requires lifecycle and leverage-step synchronization before closure.

## Why It Matters
This reduces token waste and instruction drift in long operational sessions while preserving existing safety constraints.

## Changelog
- 2026-04-06: Created file and added context-efficiency rules for `.github/copilot-instructions.md`, `AGENTS.md`, and `copilot/**` surfaces.
